name: Quarterly Review Meeting
tagline: Cream QBR meeting deck with blocky red emphasis type, grayscale business photo panels, square grid ornaments, dark edge blocks, status charts, Gantt layouts, checklist tables, and RAID/KPI review pages.

palette.description: warm cream meeting canvas with brick-red emphasis, near-black text, muted taupe grid lines, and dark gray edge blocks

typography.style: heavy uppercase business display type paired with clean sans body copy

best_for: Quarterly business reviews, project review meetings, operating updates, team retrospectives, status reports, and structured executive readouts where agenda, timeline, status, checklist, KPI, and RAID slides are needed.
avoid_for: Highly playful, colorful, luxury, or image-led brand decks; the system is intentionally meeting-oriented and structured.

source_inspiration.name: Slidesgo Quarterly Business Review Meeting
source_inspiration.notes: Independent HTML/CSS reconstruction of the public preview layout sequence. The template does not reuse source photos or proprietary presentation assets; grayscale photo regions are editable placeholders built at matching layout proportions.
